name: Drifter
description: Wanderers, barbarians and scavengers who drift between the stars without permanent employment.

barbarian.name: Barbarian
barbarian.description: You live as a primitive warrior.

wanderer.name: Wanderer
wanderer.description: You drift from world to world, taking odd jobs where you can find them.

scavenger.name: Scavenger
scavenger.description: You scrape a living from asteroid prospecting or salvage work.

mishaps.1: Severely injured (treat as a result of 2 on the Injury Table). Alternatively, roll twice on the Injury Table and take the lower result.
mishaps.2: You are kidnapped or enslaved, and must escape or be freed. Gain an Enemy.
mishaps.3: Addiction or bad habits catch up with you. Reduce one physical characteristic by 1.
mishaps.4: You fall foul of local criminals, police or authorities and must flee offworld. Gain a Rival.
mishaps.5: A scheme to make a fortune goes wrong. Lose all Benefit rolls from this term.
mishaps.6: Injured. Roll on the Injury Table.

events.2: Disaster! Roll on the Mishap Table, but you are not ejected from this career.
events.3: You are involved in a street fight, brawl or territorial dispute. Gain one of Melee 1, Gun Combat 1 or Athletics 1.
events.4: You work a passage aboard a starship. Gain one of Steward 1, Vacc Suit 1, Mechanic 1 or Astrogation 1.
events.5: You fall in with a band of fellow drifters. Gain an Ally and increase one of Streetwise, Deception or Persuade by 1.
events.6: You are hired for a brief but dangerous job. Roll END 8+; on success, gain DM+2 to a Benefit roll this term. On failure, roll on the Mishap Table (not ejected).
events.7: Life Event. Roll on the Life Events Table.
events.8: You wander to a remote region and must survive on your wits. Roll Survival 8+ to gain Survival 1 and a Contact; on failure, lose one point of END.
events.9: You discover something of value — a derelict, an artifact, salvage. Gain DM+2 to one Benefit roll.
events.10: You help out a local in trouble. Gain an Ally and DM+2 to your next Advancement check.
events.11: You pick up useful knowledge from your wanderings. Gain one level in any skill of your choice, or transfer to any other career (without a Qualification roll).
events.12: You are recruited into a major enterprise or finally find your place. You are automatically promoted.
